demographics.living_situation: lives at home with her husband

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My breast is suddenly throbbing with intense pain, and it started bleeding from the nipple this evening, I am terrified.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has become unbearable tonight and fluid started leaking from the nipple, some of it bloody — my husband made me call because I've been too frightened to get it looked at.

symptom_narrative.onset: I found a firm lump in my right breast about six months ago; it didn't hurt so I told myself it was nothing. The pain and bleeding only started this evening.
symptom_narrative.duration: The lump is six months old, the nipple and skin changes are the last month or so, and the pain and bleeding are just tonight.
symptom_narrative.character: Now it's a severe, constant, burning pain in the breast. The lump itself is hard and doesn't seem to move under my fingers.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The pain is the worst it has ever been — the paracetamol I've been taking isn't touching it.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: The upper outer part of my right breast, and the whole breast aches.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: The ache is constant tonight; the bleeding comes and goes from the nipple.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing really — the over-the-counter paracetamol gives no relief.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Any pressure or touch on the breast, and it seems to be getting worse through the evening.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Over the last month my nipple has pulled inward, the breast has changed shape and looks different from the other side, and the skin over the lump has gone dimpled and puckered, a bit like orange peel. Tonight there's clear and bloody fluid leaking from the nipple on its own. I've also been terribly tired and I've lost weight without trying over the last month.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: No — I've never had anything like this before, which is partly why I kept putting off getting it checked.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I normally manage everything at home myself, but tonight the pain and the fear have me unable to settle or think straight.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Generally well for my age; I don't see doctors much and I haven't had this lump looked at.
past_medical_history.how_managed: I've been avoiding getting it checked because I was frightened of what they might find.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives with her husband, who is present and made the call. She describes keeping to herself lately, staying home with the curtains drawn, and avoiding contact because of her fear about the breast changes.

objective_data_offered.value: on video the right nipple looks pulled inward, the skin over the upper outer breast looks dimpled and puckered, and there is blood-stained and clear fluid on the nipple
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view held by the spouse; lighting and angle limited

objective_data_offered.value: 37.4 degrees on our home thermometer, so no real fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer, taken by the husband

objective_data_offered.value: down to about 58 kg from around 63 kg over the last month or two
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: estimated from home scales and memory

objective_data_offered.value: spouse reports she is tearful, anxious and holding/guarding the right side of her chest
